name: GoHighLevel MCP Server (Funding Machine)
what_it_does: MCP server providing automation access to GoHighLevel (GHL) — the all-in-one marketing and CRM platform for agencies. Enables AI agents to automate GoHighLevel across CRM contacts, messaging, calendars, marketing campaigns, e-commerce, and workflow automation.
use_cases: Automating GHL CRM contact management and follow-up sequences from sales agents
Managing marketing campaigns and pipelines in GHL from marketing automation agents
Scheduling appointments and managing calendar workflows from booking agents
Building GHL-powered marketing automation with AI agent orchestration
not_for: Small teams not using GoHighLevel for their marketing operations
Direct consumer marketing without appropriate opt-in consent
best_when: A digital marketing agency using GoHighLevel wants AI agents to automate client CRM workflows, campaign management, and appointment scheduling — reducing manual work in the GHL platform.
avoid_when: You don't use GoHighLevel. GHL has steep learning curve — automated agents without GHL expertise may create problematic automations.

auth.notes: GoHighLevel OAuth 2.0 for agency and sub-account access. API keys available per location. Use location-scoped tokens for sub-account isolation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: GHL subscription required ($97-$297/mo); MCP server pricing unknown
pricing.notes: GHL subscription required. MCP server from Funding Machine — separate service pricing unknown.

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: CRM data includes contact PII — implement GDPR/CCPA compliance for EU/CA contacts
Messaging automation requires opt-in consent — agents must not send unsolicited messages
GHL sub-account isolation: verify agents can't access other clients' data
Complex GHL platform: agents need GHL-specific knowledge to create valid automations
Marketing email/SMS costs from GHL's LC Phone/Email systems — monitor spend
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: CRM contact PII. Marketing messaging requires opt-in consent. GDPR/CCPA compliance. Sub-account data isolation critical for agency use.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRM PII data. Messaging consent compliance required. Sub-account isolation for agencies. GDPR/CCPA compliance. OAuth scoped tokens.
